hypothesis: LV-VoI scale3 should be more human-efficient than random at similar success
expected_if_true: LV-VoI should remain on the success-cost frontier after cost matching
observed_result: random_b350 reached 439/500=87.8% at cost177.0 while LV-VoI scale3 reached 416/500=83.2% at cost202.0

hypothesis: Minimum policy-reference disagreement should remove low-value LV-VoI queries
expected_if_true: Selective LV-VoI should close or beat random_b350 on seeds0-2
observed_result: min-disagree reached 226/300=75.3% cost211.7 vs random_b350 259/300=86.3% cost95.0

hypothesis: Low-confidence mid-late score floor should reduce wasted budget
expected_if_true: Score-floor LV-VoI should reduce starts and improve cost-matched Pareto position
observed_result: score floor reached 233/300=77.7% cost253.3 and still had 94 starts vs original 96

hypothesis: LV-VoI fails because it intervenes far from the cube
expected_if_true: LV-VoI starts should be farther from the cube than random if geometry is the failure mode
observed_result: LV-VoI starts were closer: g2c_norm 0.217 vs random 0.285

tested_variant: Stack starts-only replay and phase guard
expected_if_true: Stack intervention variants should beat strong no-online matched BC
observed_result: no-online 131/180=72.8% dominated random and Stack LV-VoI at 107/180=59.4%
